case.title: COMMERCIAL COM. v. P. U. C.

opinion.h4: COMMERCIAL COM. v. P. U. C., (1959)
COMMERCIAL COMMUNICATIONS, INC., ET AL. v. PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION OF CALIFORNIA ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 719. Decided April 27, 1959.
opinion.p: J. Thomason Phelps for the Public Utilities Commission of California, and Arthur T. George, Eugene M. Prince and Francis R. Kirkham for the Pacific Telephone & Telegraph Co., appellees.
The motions to dismiss are granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE CLARK, MR. JUSTICE HARLAN and MR. JUSTICE BRENNAN took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
